filename_note: Sidecar is named '_meta.json' (not 'meta.json') because META.json (Meta Platforms ticker fixture) collides with meta.json on case-insensitive filesystems (macOS HFS+/APFS default). Underscore prefix sorts ahead of capital letters so the metadata is visually first in directory listings.
rationale: u49 deterministic-market-anchor needs ~1 year of daily OHLCV per ticker to compute ATH / 52-week distance / MTD / YTD / volume z-score. Stooq's bulk q/d/l/ endpoint requires an apikey; Stooq's q/l/ endpoint always returns the most recent day regardless of d1/d2 query params (verified 2026-05-10 — Stooq now displays the apikey gate page). Yahoo Finance v8 chart endpoint with interval=1d&range=1y returns ~250-365 daily rows per ticker without auth. yfinance-price snapshot adapter (u46) already uses query1.finance.yahoo.com; query2.finance.yahoo.com is the same backend with friendlier rate limits for dev IPs. Live runtime on GHA may hit 429 (per u46 note); when the history fetch fails the anchor module gracefully degrades to an empty MarketAnchor tuple and the briefing header line is omitted (DoD A4/A5 + Open Question fallback).

GSPC.json.note: S&P 500 — last_close == max_close on this recording (ATH scenario for unit tests)

VIX.json.note: VIX index — volumes are all zero (or None); z-score must resolve to None

AAPL.json.note: Apple — last_close == max_close on this recording (ATH scenario)

BTC-USD.json.note: Bitcoin — 366 rows because crypto trades 365 days/yr

ETH-USD.json.note: Ethereum — 366 rows because crypto trades 365 days/yr
